response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level bar with 10+ years of fullstack experience including TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI-agent infrastructure. Strong match on every required skill and most nice-to-haves. Main risks are overqualification leading to boredom or salary mismatch, and PostgreSQL experience is not explicit (MongoDB/MySQL shown instead). Berlin-based, satisfying on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple Berlin product companies
Covers most nice-to-haves: AWS CDK, Kubernetes, MCP/LLM agent tooling
Berlin-based with strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level role — flight risk and likely salary mismatch
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed; SQL experience is MySQL/MongoDB-leaning
Only basic German, which may limit collaboration in a German-market renovation/consulting domain
